text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thank you! You're really good at this, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'll definitely return the favor to you! I'm gonna
get Dia to teach me how to play and practice a
bunch!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Then I'll bring back a bunch of Cuties for you, so
make sure you set aside a spot to display them
all! ♪
